CAREERS

DO YOU WANT TO MAKE A DIFFERENCE?

Are you a dedicated, energetic individual looking for a career in child education? Are you interested in joining a team of enthusiastic, hard-working people who are passionate about teaching children?

Join the Leitrim Montessori Preschool team! We have a dedicated team focused on providing an environment conducive to cultivating children’s natural enthusiasm to learn and to continue learning. Responsible, self-motivated, caring people who share our commitment to the Montessori philosophy are always welcome to submit a resume. We hire part-time and full-time staff in the following positions:

 

Head Teacher
Teacher
Classroom Assistant

To apply send your resume by email to info@leitrimmontessori.com . Please specify whether you are looking for full-time or part-time work. We would like to thank all applicants for their interest in our school, however only those candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.

© Copyright 2009-2026 by Leitrim Montessori Preschool | All rights reserved
